inputs.contents: **Proof.** Suppose there were a graph with an odd number of vertices with odd degree. Then the sum of the degrees in the graph would be odd, which is impossible, by the handshake lemma.

bodylist.description: Suppose there were a graph with an odd number of vertices with odd degree.
Then the sum of the degrees in the graph would be odd, which is impossible, by the handshake lemma.
